гҖҖгҖҖDirected by Jeffrey Nicholson. With Michael Saquella, Robert Costanzo, John Capodice, Kristin Dattilo. The Italian mob descends on the Mexico border, to take on the most powerful cartel in America. Spencer ex mobster in witness protection battles the cartel who captured his son. His mob buddies come to Arizona to help him handle the cartel.
